name: Enhanced PHC Charitable Contribution Limits

eligibility.description: Applies when calculating the specific 'undistributed personal holding company income' subject to the PHC penalty tax.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows PHCs to use individual charitable contribution percentage limits (up to 50/60%) instead of the standard 10% corporate limit when calculating undistributed PHC income.
